name: ceo-datamart-insights
description: Trusted CEO insight briefs and drill-down answers from dbt-documented DuckDB datamarts.

interface.shortDescription: Trusted CEO insights from dbt and DuckDB
interface.longDescription: Analyze a local DuckDB datamart documented with dbt artifacts, produce executive insight briefs with SQL-backed claims, and support follow-up CEO questions through read-only local queries.
defaultPrompt: Use my dbt-documented DuckDB datamart to explain this month's CEO metrics.
